name: Praram 9 Hospital Public Company Limited
summary: Praram 9 Hospital Public Company Limited operates a hospital under the Praram 9 Hospital name in Thailand. The company offers a range of tertiary care services, including health promotion, preventive healthcare, diagnosis, treatment, and rehabilitation in the medical areas of obstetrics and gynecology, surgery, medicine, pediatrics, orthopedist, kidney transplant, and cardiovascular. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 166 licensed beds. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
